CustomField.description: Free-text supplemental CE rationale. Companion to nepa_process_code__c (the structured CE code picklist). Addresses the ce_category free-text chaos identified in NEPATEC feature engineering — structured code goes in nepa_process_code__c; narrative explanation and non-standard citations go here.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Supplemental CE rationale, non-standard citations, or coordinator notes. Use nepa_process_code__c for the structured CE code.
CustomField.label: CE Rationale Supplemental
